name: Collapsible
description: An interactive component that expands/collapses to show or hide content

defaultOpen.description: Whether the collapsible is initially open (uncontrolled)

onOpenChange.description: Callback when open state changes - (open: boolean) => void

whenNot: Navigation menus with complex interactions (use Menu)
Modal or overlay content (use Dialog or Popover)
guidelines: Use clear trigger labels that indicate expandable content
Consider defaultOpen for primary content users often need
Keep trigger text concise but descriptive
Use chevron icons consistently to indicate collapsible state
accessibility: Trigger must have aria-expanded to indicate state
Content region needs aria-labelledby pointing to trigger
Focus should remain on trigger after toggle

examples.name: Default
examples.description: Basic collapsible with trigger and content
examples.code:
Click to expand

This content is hidden by default and revealed when the trigger is clicked.

examples.name: Default Open

examples.code:

examples.name: Disabled
examples.code:
Cannot toggle (disabled)

This content cannot be shown because the collapsible is disabled.

relations.note: Use Accordion for multiple exclusive collapsible sections
Sidebar uses Collapsible for section expand/collapse
Use Menu for dropdown navigation with actions

propsSummary: defaultOpen: boolean - initial open state (default: false)
onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void - state change callback
